experiences.name: Adventure Tea with Royalty
experiences.description: An enchanting tea party experience where guests enjoy tea, treats, and royal encounters with Disney princesses in an elegant setting.

experiences.name: Animator's Palate
experiences.description: Rotational dining restaurant featuring interactive animation entertainment where the black-and-white room transforms into full color as you dine, with character appearances.

experiences.name: Animator's Table
experiences.description: Disney Adventure's signature dining experience with live entertainment and character interactions in an immersive animation-themed setting.

experiences.name: Arendelle: A Frozen Dining Adventure
experiences.description: Immersive Frozen-themed rotational dining with live performances by Elsa, Anna, Kristoff, and Olaf while you enjoy a Nordic-inspired feast in an Arendelle ballroom.

experiences.name: Avengers Assemble!
experiences.description: A spectacular Marvel-themed live action show featuring the Avengers in an epic battle experience aboard the Disney Adventure.

experiences.name: Azure
experiences.description: Live entertainment venue on the Disney Wonder featuring contemporary music, dancing, and special events in a vibrant atmosphere.

experiences.name: Baymax Super Exercise Expo
experiences.description: An interactive fitness experience led by Baymax where guests join in fun exercises and health-themed activities.

experiences.name: Beauty and the Beast
experiences.description: A full-scale Broadway-style musical production of the beloved tale as old as time, performed in the Walt Disney Theatre.

experiences.name: Cadillac Lounge
experiences.description: A sophisticated lounge on the Disney Wonder with live music performances, cocktails, and a classic Americana atmosphere.

experiences.name: Cask & Cannon
experiences.description: A maritime-themed lounge on the Disney Destiny with live entertainment, craft cocktails, and a warm nautical atmosphere.

experiences.name: Character Greetings
experiences.description: Meet beloved Disney, Pixar, Marvel, and Star Wars characters throughout the ship at scheduled meet-and-greet locations for photos and autographs.

experiences.name: D Lounge
experiences.description: Family-friendly entertainment lounge hosting game shows, trivia, karaoke, family activities, and live performances throughout the day and evening.

experiences.name: De Vil's
experiences.description: A glamorous Cruella de Vil-inspired lounge with live entertainment, signature cocktails, and daring black-and-white decor on the Disney Destiny.

experiences.name: Disney Dreams – An Enchanted Classic
experiences.description: A heartwarming stage spectacular featuring Peter Pan guiding a young girl through classic Disney stories including The Little Mermaid, Aladdin, The Lion King, and more.

experiences.name: Disney Hercules
experiences.description: A brand-new Broadway-style musical production based on the beloved Disney film Hercules, debuting on the Disney Destiny.

experiences.name: Disney Seas the Adventure
experiences.description: A spectacular stage show featuring Captain Minnie Mouse leading guests on a magical adventure through beloved Disney stories with dazzling effects.

experiences.name: Disney The Tale of Moana
experiences.description: An original Broadway-style musical production telling Moana's story of wayfinding and adventure, exclusive to the Disney Treasure.

experiences.name: Disney's Aladdin – A Musical Spectacular
experiences.description: A dazzling Broadway-caliber production of the classic Aladdin story featuring the Genie, magic carpet ride, and iconic songs.

experiences.name: Disney's Believe
experiences.description: A heartwarming stage show about a father who rediscovers the magic of believing through encounters with beloved Disney characters.

experiences.name: Disney's Oceaneer Club
experiences.description: An immersive supervised kids' club for ages 3–12 with themed activity rooms, character visits, games, arts and crafts, and interactive adventures.

experiences.name: Disney's Oceaneer Lab
experiences.description: A hands-on activity space for kids featuring science experiments, creative projects, and interactive experiences with Disney character appearances.

experiences.name: District Lounge
experiences.description: A sophisticated lounge in the Dream's nightlife district with live music, craft cocktails, and an intimate atmosphere.

experiences.name: Duffy and The Friend Ship
experiences.description: A charming live show aboard the Disney Adventure featuring Duffy the Disney Bear and friends in a heartwarming friendship-themed performance.

experiences.name: Evolution
experiences.description: A modern nightclub and dance venue on the Disney Dream with live DJ sets, themed dance parties, and a sleek atmosphere.

experiences.name: Fathoms
experiences.description: Nightclub and entertainment venue on the Disney Magic hosting live comedy shows, dance parties, and themed events.

experiences.name: Frozen Deck Party
experiences.description: A magical open-air celebration on the pool deck featuring Elsa, Anna, Olaf, and other Frozen characters with snow effects, music, and dancing.

experiences.name: Frozen, A Musical Spectacular
experiences.description: A spectacular Broadway-style adaptation of Frozen featuring stunning costumes, puppetry, special effects, and all the beloved songs.

experiences.name: Garden Stage
experiences.description: An outdoor entertainment stage aboard the Disney Adventure hosting a variety of live performances, music acts, and special events.

experiences.name: Halloween on the High Seas
experiences.description: Seasonal Halloween celebration with costume contests, trick-or-treating, a villains-themed deck party, spooky décor, and special character meet-and-greets on select fall sailings.

experiences.name: It's a Cruise Holiday – Off We Go!
experiences.description: A festive holiday-themed deck party celebration aboard the Disney Wonder featuring Mickey and friends in holiday attire with special seasonal entertainment.

experiences.name: Keys
experiences.description: An elegant adults-only piano bar on the Disney Magic with live music, cocktails, and a sophisticated atmosphere.

experiences.name: Let's Set Sail
experiences.description: An exciting embarkation show aboard the Disney Adventure welcoming guests aboard with music, dancing, and Disney character appearances.

experiences.name: Luna
experiences.description: A sophisticated lounge on the Disney Wish with live entertainment, signature cocktails, and a magical evening ambiance.

experiences.name: Marvel Day at Sea
experiences.description: A full-day Marvel-themed celebration with superhero meet-and-greets, stunt shows, themed entertainment, exclusive merchandise, and an epic deck party on select sailings.

experiences.name: Mickey's Color Spin Dance Party
experiences.description: A high-energy dance party featuring Mickey and friends with vibrant colors, music, and interactive fun for the whole family.

experiences.name: Mickey's Sail-A-Wave Party!... A Bon Voyage Celebration
experiences.description: The iconic sailaway deck party as your ship departs port, featuring Mickey and the gang leading music, dancing, and a festive bon voyage celebration.

experiences.name: Moana: Call of the Sea
experiences.description: A stunning live performance aboard the Disney Adventure bringing Moana's ocean voyage to life with music, choreography, and spectacular effects.

experiences.name: New Year's Eve
experiences.description: A spectacular New Year's Eve celebration at sea with a special deck party, midnight countdown, fireworks, character appearances, and festive entertainment.

experiences.name: Nightingale's
experiences.description: An enchanting speakeasy-style lounge on the Disney Wish featuring live music, premium cocktails, and an elegant atmosphere.

experiences.name: Olaf's Royal Picnic
experiences.description: A delightful character dining experience hosted by Olaf where families enjoy a whimsical picnic with appearances by Frozen royalty.

experiences.name: Pirate Night
experiences.description: A swashbuckling evening celebration with pirate-themed dining, a spectacular fireworks show at sea, Captain Jack Sparrow meet-and-greets, and a lively deck party.

experiences.name: Pixar Day at Sea
experiences.description: A full day of Pixar fun with rare character meet-and-greets, themed activities, Pixar movie screenings, and a colorful deck party on select sailings.

experiences.name: Private Karaoke Rooms
experiences.description: Private karaoke suites aboard the Disney Adventure where groups can sing their hearts out to Disney classics and popular hits.

experiences.name: Remember
experiences.description: An original live stage production aboard the Disney Adventure celebrating cherished Disney memories through music, storytelling, and stunning theatrical effects.

experiences.name: Royal Court Royal Tea
experiences.description: A premium character tea party experience with Disney princesses, featuring elegant refreshments, gifts, and royal interactions for guests of all ages.

experiences.name: Royal Society for Friendship and Tea
experiences.description: A charming tea party aboard the Disney Adventure where guests enjoy an enchanting afternoon with Disney characters, treats, and keepsakes.

experiences.name: Saga
experiences.description: A live entertainment lounge on the Disney Destiny with themed shows, music performances, and signature cocktails.

experiences.name: Sailing Away Deck Party
experiences.description: A festive sailaway celebration on the pool deck as the ship departs, featuring Disney characters, live music, and dancing to kick off the cruise.

experiences.name: Sarabi
experiences.description: A Lion King-inspired lounge on the Disney Treasure named after Simba's mother, featuring African-inspired cocktails and live entertainment.

experiences.name: Scat Cat Lounge
experiences.description: An Aristocats-inspired jazz lounge with live music performances, craft cocktails, and a New Orleans jazz club atmosphere.

experiences.name: Set Sail with Bluey and Bingo
experiences.description: A fun-filled deck party featuring Bluey and Bingo with games, dancing, and interactive activities on select sailings from Florida.

experiences.name: Skipper Society
experiences.description: A Jungle Cruise-inspired lounge with explorer-themed decor, live entertainment, craft cocktails, and the Skippers' signature witty humor.

experiences.name: Soul Cat Lounge
experiences.description: A live entertainment lounge on the Disney Magic featuring soul, R&B, and jazz performances in a hip, intimate setting.

experiences.name: Star Wars: Hyperspace Lounge
experiences.description: An immersive Star Wars-themed lounge set aboard a luxurious starcruiser, featuring galaxy-inspired cocktails and a viewport showing hyperspace jumps to iconic Star Wars planets.

experiences.name: Tangled: The Musical
experiences.description: A Broadway-style musical adaptation of Rapunzel's adventure featuring original songs, stunning sets, and the beloved characters.

experiences.name: Thanksgiving at Sea
experiences.description: A special Thanksgiving celebration at sea with a traditional feast, themed activities, character appearances in pilgrim costumes, and seasonal décor.

experiences.name: The Golden Mickeys
experiences.description: An award show-style stage spectacular celebrating the golden moments of Disney films with live performances, music, and stunning special effects.

experiences.name: The Lion King: Celebration in the Sky
experiences.description: A spectacular outdoor celebration bringing The Lion King to life with live performances, character appearances, music, and a dazzling sky show aboard the Disney Adventure.

experiences.name: The Little Mermaid
experiences.description: A captivating Broadway-style musical production of Ariel's underwater adventure, exclusively aboard the Disney Wish.

experiences.name: The Sanctum
experiences.description: A mysterious, immersive lounge on the Disney Destiny inspired by the Sanctum Sanctorum, with live entertainment and craft cocktails in a dark, atmospheric setting.

experiences.name: Twice Charmed: An Original Twist on the Cinderella Story
experiences.description: An original stage musical that reimagines the Cinderella story with a twist — the Fairy Godmother's wand is stolen, creating a brand-new adventure.

experiences.name: Very Merrytime Cruises
experiences.description: Seasonal holiday celebration with festive décor, a tree-lighting ceremony, Santa character appearances, holiday-themed entertainment, and a special New Year's Eve party on select winter sailings.

experiences.name: Vista Café
experiences.description: A casual café and lounge with live entertainment, coffee, cocktails, and a relaxed atmosphere in the nightlife district.

experiences.name: Worlds of Marvel
experiences.description: An immersive Marvel cinematic dining adventure where guests join Ant-Man and The Wasp on an interactive mission with special effects transforming the restaurant around you.

experiences.name: Disney's Aladdin — A Musical Spectacular
experiences.description: A Broadway-caliber stage adaptation of Aladdin featuring dazzling sets, magic carpet illusions, and iconic songs performed in the Walt Disney Theatre.

experiences.name: Moana — One Ocean
experiences.description: A spectacular live show celebrating the story of Moana with stunning visuals, music, and choreography in the Walt Disney Theatre.

experiences.name: Heroes Unite: A Marvel Showcase
experiences.description: An action-packed live show bringing Marvel Super Heroes to the stage with special effects, stunts, and an original storyline.

experiences.name: Jack Sparrow and the Siren Queen
experiences.description: A swashbuckling live show featuring Captain Jack Sparrow in an original adventure with the mysterious Siren Queen.

experiences.name: Princess Gathering
experiences.description: Meet multiple Disney Princesses at a dedicated meet-and-greet location for photos, autographs, and magical moments.

experiences.name: Marvel Super Heroes Meet & Greet
experiences.description: Meet Marvel Super Heroes like Spider-Man, Captain America, and more for photos and autographs in a Marvel-themed area.

experiences.name: Mickey's Sail-A-Wave Party
experiences.description: A lively sail-away deck party featuring Mickey and friends as the ship sets off, with music, dancing, and confetti on the pool deck.

experiences.name: Movies Under the Stars
experiences.description: Watch Disney and Pixar films on the big outdoor Funnel Vision screen on the pool deck under the stars, with complimentary popcorn and blankets.

experiences.name: Villains Tonight!
experiences.description: A wickedly fun stage show starring Hades and a cast of Disney Villains in the Walt Disney Theatre. Replaced by newer productions.

experiences.name: Twice Charmed: An Original Twist on the Cinderella Story
experiences.description: An original stage musical that imagined what would happen if the Fairy Godmother's wand fell into the wrong hands, performed in the Walt Disney Theatre until 2014.

experiences.name: Toy Story — The Musical
experiences.description: A stage musical retelling the story of Woody, Buzz, and the toys with original songs and puppetry, performed in the Walt Disney Theatre.

experiences.name: Disney Dreams — An Enchanted Classic
experiences.description: A beloved bedtime story brought to life with Peter Pan guiding a young girl through classic Disney moments. One of the original DCL signature shows.

experiences.name: The Golden Mickeys
experiences.description: An award show-themed stage production celebrating the best of Disney music and storytelling, one of the original DCL entertainment offerings.

experiences.name: All Aboard! Let the Magic Begin
experiences.description: The original DCL variety show featuring Disney characters in a musical celebration, one of the fleet's earliest Walt Disney Theatre productions.

experiences.name: Believe
experiences.description: A stage spectacular about a father rediscovering the magic of Disney through his daughter, featuring Aladdin's Genie as the magical guide.

experiences.name: Walt Disney Theatre
experiences.description: The main Broadway-style theatre aboard each ship, hosting full-scale musical productions, variety shows, and live entertainment throughout every sailing.

experiences.name: Buena Vista Theatre
experiences.description: A full-size cinema showing first-run Disney, Pixar, and Marvel films along with classic favorites throughout your cruise.

experiences.name: Never Land Cinema
experiences.description: An intimate onboard cinema screening the latest Disney, Pixar, and Marvel movies in a cozy, immersive setting.

experiences.name: Baymax Cinemas
experiences.description: A Big Hero 6-themed cinema complex aboard the Disney Adventure, screening the latest Disney, Pixar, and Marvel films.

experiences.name: Atrium Lobby
experiences.description: The grand multi-deck lobby at the heart of the ship, hosting live entertainment, character appearances, and special events.

experiences.name: Grand Hall
experiences.description: The stunning grand atrium and central gathering space featuring themed décor, live entertainment, character greetings, and special events.
